TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Larepaq, title = Larepaq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Larepaq} }

S.FORM: alang Larepaq ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 126 buwan, 326 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 324 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 96%, Amis 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Larepaq hya' ga Tjuaqau. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Larepaq ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Larepaq ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 126 buwan, 326 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 324 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 96%, Amis 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Larepaq hya' ga Tjuaqau. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Larepaq ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ larepaq ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taznin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔzil na larepaq ħjaʔ ɣa tjuaqau. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ larepaq ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
